note: Seed data for the Landscape Map and (Phase 3) link-freshness automation. We LINK to these rather than duplicate them.

resources.name: Anthropic Documentation
resources.what: The source of truth for Claude, the API, models, and features. When AILmanac and the official docs disagree, the docs win.

resources.name: Anthropic Prompt Library
resources.what: Ready-made example prompts maintained by Anthropic.

resources.name: Anthropic Cookbook
resources.what: Runnable code recipes for the API (tool use, RAG, vision, and more).

resources.name: Claude Code documentation
resources.what: Reference docs for the agentic CLI/IDE tool.

resources.name: Anthropic Academy
resources.what: Free guided courses on building with Claude.

resources.name: Model Context Protocol
resources.what: The open standard behind MCP servers/connectors, with the server directory.

resources.name: awesome-claude-code
resources.what: Curated list of Claude Code commands, hooks, and workflows.

resources.name: Prompt Engineering Guide
resources.what: Deep, vendor-neutral reference on prompting techniques and research.
